popularStory.description: During the past several decades occasional questions have been raised about the medieval ancestry of Ralph de Limesi (born about 1040 AD), who appears as an ancestor of the Broughs of Staffordshire, E …

zh.of Hertford Priory, Hertfordshire, Engla: 英國賀特福爾賀特福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Limesi於大約1040年出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利利梅希時，他的父親Hugo de Limesi de Tosny52歲，母親Christine de Conteville42歲。他於大約1062年與Christina在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1093年之後在英國賀特福爾賀特福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de Limesi于大约1040年出生在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利利梅希时，他的父亲Hugo de Limesi de Tosny52岁，母亲Christine de Conteville42岁。他于大约1062年与Christina在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1093年之后在英国賀特福爾賀特福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Limesi
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish (Limés): habitational name from Limés in Oviedo province, northern Spain.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Limesi was born about 1040, in Limésy, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, his father, Hugo de Limesi de Tosny, was 52 and his mother, Christine de Conteville, was 42. He married Christina about 1062, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died after 1093, in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Limesi est né environ 1040, à Limésy, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, son père, Hugo de Limesi de Tosny, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Christine de Conteville, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Christina environ 1062, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1093, à Hertford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de Limesi um 1040 in Limésy, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugo de Limesi de Tosny 52 und seine Mutter Christine de Conteville 42. Er hat um 1062 in England Christina geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1093 in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Limesi è nato il circa 1040 nel Limésy, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Hugo de Limesi de Tosny, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Christine de Conteville, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Christina circa 1062, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1093, nel Hertford, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Limesiが約1040年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメリムeシで生まれた時，父Hugo de Limesi de Tosnyは52歳，母Christine de Contevilleは42歳であった。約1062年にイギリスでChristinaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1093年以後にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアハートフォードで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Limesi(이)가 대략 1040년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 림e시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugo de Limesi de Tosny(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Christine de Conteville(은)는 42세였다. 그는 대략 1062년 영국에서 Christina(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1093년 이후 영국 허트퍼드실르 허트퍼드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Limesi nasceu aproximadamente 1040, em Limésy, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, seu pai, Hugo de Limesi de Tosny, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Christine de Conteville, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Christina aproximadamente 1062, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 1093, em Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Limesi родился около 1040 г. в местности лимeси, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugo de Limesi de Tosny было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Christine de Conteville, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Christina около 1062 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер после 1093 г. в местности хиртфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия.

sm.about 1040–after 1093: e tusa o le 1040–ina ua ma'ea le 1093

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph de Limesi nació aproximadamente 1040, en Limésy, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Hugo de Limesi de Tosny, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Christine de Conteville, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Christina aproximadamente 1062, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1093, en Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
